scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=odontologo
scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute dentalsys-db --file=migrations/025_comisiones_giftcards_encuestas.sql && wrangler d1 execute dentalsys-db --file=migrations/026_pricing_update.sql
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute dentalsys-db --local --file=migrations/025_comisiones_giftcards_encuestas.sql && wrangler d1 execute dentalsys-db --local --file=migrations/026_pricing_update.sql
